headline: You have 3 revenue-ready SaaS products but Project Genesis has been blocked on Stripe billing for 17 days — complete that payment flow immediately to unlock your first revenue stream.

opportunities.title: Ship Project Genesis with basic Stripe billing this week
opportunities.description: Genesis is 40% complete with a live demo but zero revenue capability. The Stripe integration is the only blocker preventing launch. This is your fastest path to first dollar since the product already exists.

opportunities.title: Package autonomous agent framework as open-source + paid hosting
opportunities.description: Your refund agents (Kiwi, PORFÍO) and GTM agents share common Node.js + Claude patterns. Extract the framework, open-source it for community, and offer hosted execution as a paid service through Genesis or Vigilia.

opportunities.title: Content series: 'Building in Public' your refund agent success
opportunities.description: You're actively recovering $900+ with autonomous agents that commit daily. Document the win/loss ratio, share code snippets, and build audience around practical AI automation. Perfect Twitter thread material.

opportunities.title: Merge AI Workflow Studio into Genesis as premium tier
opportunities.description: Both products are Next.js + TypeScript + Supabase workflow builders at 55% and 40% completion. Consolidate into Genesis Basic (current) and Genesis Pro (with D3/Three.js visual builder). Reduces maintenance overhead while creating upsell path.

opportunities.title: Kill BioMirror, archive Escape Babylon
opportunities.description: BioMirror has 1 commit in 3 days and undefined MVP. Escape Babylon is paused with 0 commits. Your focus is scattered across 8 active projects — ruthlessly cut the bottom 20% to accelerate revenue projects.

opportunities.title: Open-source Vigilia to drive SaaS adoption
opportunities.description: Vigilia is already AGPL licensed and 65% complete with active commits. GitHub-first strategy builds developer community around AI governance, positions you as thought leader, and creates inbound for consulting/enterprise deals.

quickWins: Tweet thread about your refund agents' daily commit streak and recovery progress
Create GitHub repos for Vigilia and your agent framework to start building community
Export your 14-doc Engineering Foundations as a public Substack series for developer audience
weeklyDigest: Your portfolio shows strong technical execution (daily commits on revenue recovery agents) but revenue paralysis — Genesis has been blocked on Stripe for 17 days while you maintain 8 active projects. This week: Complete Genesis billing, archive BioMirror/Escape Babylon, and choose between consolidating or shipping AI Workflow Studio separately. Your agent automation work is genuinely impressive and marketable — the refund recovery alone is worth content/community building. Focus: ship one revenue stream this week rather than advancing all projects incrementally.
